name: Portable Clothesline with Clips - Brightroom™
description:
Hang your laundry wherever and whenever you need with this Portable Clothesline with Clips from Brightroom™. This lightweight clothesline made of polyester is conveniently sized and attaches with carabiner-style clips at each end. Plus, it features built-in clips for easily hanging clothes and other small items. It is easy to carry and can be used anywhere: balcony, bathroom, backyard, hotel, students' dormitory laundry, etc.. A must for campers. After use, turn the small bar to retract the rope into the casing.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
